action.reasoning: Observation: Strong DKT baseline (AUC 0.7494 after 5 epochs), loss decreasing steadily, pipeline validated (predict.py works, ~15s/iter). Analysis: Model under capacity (hidden=128/1layer); can scale to hidden=256/2layers+dropout=0.3 without exceeding param limit or time. More epochs (20) feasible (~1min). Decision: Update model/train/predict for larger regularized DKT, save/load all hparams from ckpt, train 20 epochs with lr=5e-4+wd, submit eval on new best to measure improvement.
